title: CraftPit: Origins
description: A new modpack project inspired by the OG CraftPit server.
body:
A fun tech/exploration based modpack with a focus on optimisation, terrain generation and technology based mods. The goal of this pack is to enhance the gameplay without breaking the spririt of core Minecraft gameplay.

_This pack is meant for use on the private CraftPit: Origins server, but can freely be played solo or on your own private server._

Leveraging mods like [Terralith](https://modrinth.com/mod/terralith), and [YUNG's](https://modrinth.com/user/YUNGNICKYOUNG/mods) suite of Better structures the world generation has been a big focus of the pack, creating vast mountain ranges, and long stretches of rivers that carve their way through mountains and out into the ocean. Animals are enhanced with the help of [Naturalist](https://modrinth.com/mod/naturalist) and unfriendly mobs get a boost with the help of [Creeper](https://modrinth.com/mod/creeper-overhaul) and [Enderman Overhaul](https://modrinth.com/mod/enderman-overhaul), along with the aid of [Spawn Animations](https://modrinth.com/datapack/spawn-animations) and [Nyf's Spiders](https://modrinth.com/mod/nyfs-spiders) to really bring them to life.

The pack's primary tech mod is [Create](https://modrinth.com/mod/create-fabric) allowing for the creation of huge automated factories, railways, or Airships with the aid of [Valkyrian Skies](https://modrinth.com/mod/valkyrien-skies).
However if you want to take your technological advancements a step further, [Ad Astra](https://modrinth.com/mod/ad-astra) allows you to take your adventures beyond the stars!
And if combat is your preferred pastime, [ZsoltMolnarrr's](https://modrinth.com/user/ZsoltMolnarrr/mods) suite of [Combat](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-combat) and [Magic](https://modrinth.com/mod/wizards) mods combined with [Artifacts](https://modrinth.com/mod/artifacts) should keep your dungeon crawling exciting.

_As previously mentioned this pack is intended for use on a private server, but if you wish to start your own server, simply copy the contents of the mods folder and config folders over to your Fabric server._
